mapper.select:
select * from project_study
and theme like concat('%',#{theme},'%')
and category = #{category}
order by id asc
select u.id, u.username, u.name, u.role, u.avatar, u.email, u.phone, u.sex from project_signup as ps join user as u on ps.user_id = u.id where ps.project_id=#{projectId};
mapper.insert: insert into project_study(cover_path, theme, introduction, content, category, capacity, status, create_time, update_time, like_count, click_count) values(#{coverPath}, #{theme}, #{introduction}, #{content}, #{category}, #{capacity}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},#{likeCount},#{clickCount})
